title: Solana Agent Transaction Validator
description: Before an agent signs any Solana transaction, call three GoldRush endpoints in parallel: (1) recipient wallet summary — is this a fresh wallet or known flagged address? (2) token risk score — does the token have active mint/freeze authority? (3) agent wallet balance — is there enough SOL for rent + fees? Combine results into a structured go/no-go payload the agent parses before submitting any instruction to the network.
useCase: Build a pre-flight transaction validator that runs three parallel GoldRush checks and returns a structured go/no-go decision before an agent submits any Solana transaction.

keyParams.agentWallet: The agent's own wallet address to check SOL balance for fees
keyParams.recipientAddress: Destination wallet address to assess wallet age and activity
keyParams.tokenAddress: SPL token mint address involved in the transaction to risk-score
keyParams.minSolForFees: Minimum SOL required to proceed (default 0.01 SOL for rent+fees)
